_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 79.1% August-bottom analog plus structural tailwinds (ETF flows at max, DXY weakness, stablecoin growth) provide the fuel for a one-rung advance from Complacency into Hope as sentiment uncoils from extreme fear.
next_move.brains_agree: Yes — analyst explicitly predicts Hope with UP direction and medium conviction; narrative implies the same trajectory via its accumulation-bottom-to-rally framing, though it does not name a specific next phase.
